text: Stdout is for MCP traffic, not logs. The one Program.cs line that keeps a C# MCP server on .NET 11 alive.
SearchValues<T> built once is 250x faster than IndexOfAny. Built per call, it's slower. The static readonly rule, in .NET 11.
Hand-roll an INotifyPropertyChanged source generator on .NET 11. ForAttributeWithMetadataName, EquatableArray, and the global:: rule that stops it breaking.
